mapper.select:
/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - actionLogin */
SELECT A.URKEY ,A.URPW ,A.URNM ,A.URGRKEY ,A.LAKEY ,'PASS' AS CHGPW ,A.DST ,( SELECT UTCOFFSET FROM TADMIN_MST_TZ_HD WHERE TZKEY=A.TZKEY ) AS UTCOFFSET ,A.CTKEY ,C.CTNM AS CTKEY_DESC ,A.OWKEYM AS OWKEY ,A.LOGINFAILCNT ,A.DIVCD ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.URTYP ,A.RSTCDIV ,A.RSTCLGST ,A.IPADDR AS UNIQUEADDR ,A.REPACKEY ,B.ICGRPKEY ,A.QUIESCENCEYN FROM TADMIN_MST_UR A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC B ON A.URKEY = B.URKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY WHERE A.URKEY = #{urkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectAppKeyRoleAuth */ SELECT A.APKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXAPGT A INNER JOIN ( SELECT TB3.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_UR TB1 INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGR TB2 ON TB1.URGRKEY = TB2.URGRKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGRXROGT TB3 ON TB1.URGRKEY = TB3.URGRKEY WHERE TB1.URKEY = #{urkey} UNION SELECT ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_URXROGT WHERE URKEY = #{urkey} ) B ON A.ROKEY=B.ROKEY GROUP BY A.APKEY

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectAppKeyRoleAll */
SELECT APKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AP WHERE ISOFFLINE = 'N'

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectOwnerKeyRole */ SELECT A.OWKEY , C.OWNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXOWGT A INNER JOIN () B ON A.ROKEY = B.ROKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY GROUP BY A.OWKEY , C.OWNM

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectCenterKeyRole */ SELECT C.CTKEY , C.CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXCTGT A INNER JOIN (
) B ON A.ROKEY=B.ROKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT C ON A.CTKEY=C.CTKEY GROUP BY C.CTKEY , C.CTNM ORDER BY C.CTKEY

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectMenuObjectKeyRole */ SELECT A.APKEY, A.USKEY, A.USOBTYPE, C.MEKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXUSOBGT A INNER JOIN (
) B ON A.ROKEY=B.ROKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ME C ON A.USKEY = C.USKEY AND A.APKEY = C.APKEY WHERE A.APKEY = #{appKey} AND C.DELYN <> 'Y' GROUP BY A.APKEY, A.USKEY, A.USOBTYPE, C.MEKEY

/* adm-userbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectRoleApplication */ SELECT APKEY FROM ( SELECT AP.APKEY , AP.APORDER FROM TADMIN_MST_AP AP INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ROXAPGT APGT ON AP.APKEY = APGT.APKEY INNER JOIN ( ) B ON APGT.ROKEY = B.ROKEY WHERE AP.ISOFFLINE = 'N' GROUP BY AP.APKEY , AP.APORDER ORDER BY AP.APORDER )
